item.title: Find Your ‘Design DNA’ With This Science-Inspired Quiz, By A Psychologist
item.description: Most people think design style is about aesthetics. A growing body of research suggests it's actually about neurology, stress response and identity.

item.title: ‘Resident Evil Requiem’ Instantly Breaks A Steam Playercount Record
item.description: Resident Evil Requiem just smashed through a long-term Steam playercount record just hours after launch, and it's still going.

item.title: Ultrahuman’s Ring Pro Promises Oura Beating Battery Life
item.description: Legal troubles continue to stymie a U.S. release but Ultrahuman has announced the Ring Pro, which offers remarkably long battery life of over two week...

item.title: I Am Not Loving The ‘Marathon’ Server Slam So Far
item.description: The Marathon server slam is here, and in the first full day, I have not found myself convinced this is going to be for me, or has changed much from th...

item.title: A New Antibody Treatment For Breast Cancer
item.description: A one‑year course of T‑DM1 offers excellent cancer‑free survival for early HER2‑positive breast cancer, with far less nerve damage and hair loss than ...
